activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identified in invoice text blocks (group structure)
EU origin normalization for certificates and invoices

consignor.invoice_value:
VOLVO BUS CORPORATION
SE-405 08 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor "Volvo Bus Corporation" from certificate matches invoice issuer name with allowed abbreviation of legal form and normalized address (Göteborg/ Gothenburg). Land Sverige matches exactly. Consignor name also appears explicitly in invoice header and invoice text blocks, confirming same juridical party. No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value:
Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd
Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462
Johannesburg
South Africa
consignee.invoice_value:
Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd
Cnr Jet Park Road & Saligna St 1462
Johannesburg
South Africa
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate "Volvo Group Southern Africa Pty Ltd" exactly matches consignee in invoice including company name, address and land South Africa. Invoice contains explicit consignee field matching the certificate without contradictions.

goods_description.certificate_value:
01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC
WITH 01 ESS
VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
goods_description.invoice_value:
01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL
BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate matches exactly the invoice description. The exact article number is not specified, but the text description is verified identically after normalization (case, punctuation). VIN No matches invoice VIN confirming unique item identity. Thus, goods description is verified.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of 6100 kg in certificate exactly matches total weight 6100 KG in invoice total weight field, with allowed numeric normalization (truncation of any decimals not present). The invoice specifies total weight as 6100 KG and unit matches. Thus, quantity is verified.

origin.motivation: Country of origin in certificate is "Sweden" and invoice specifies "Country of origin: SE" (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden). According to normalization rules including ISO code acceptance and EU origin normalization, these are equivalent. The invoice includes explicit origin field confirming country of origin.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points are verified as MATCH with consistent normalization and no contradictions. The document pair meets strict criteria for automatic approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
